---
title: "Coursework"
toc: true
toc-location: right
---


## Learning Goals

::: {.goal-card}
Through my graduate study, I aim to strengthen my ability to:

- translate business questions into analytical problems
- communicate insights clearly
- support decisions with data
:::

## Relevant Coursework

::: {.course-card}
### [A/B Testing (MGTA 495)](AB_Testing.qmd)

Simulation of A/B experiments, hypothesis testing, and statistical inference.

**Key Topics**
- Experimental design

- Hypothesis testing

- Bootstrap standard errors

- Central Limit Theorem

- A/B test evaluation
:::
